$comment: INFRASTRUCTURE: Every run writes provenance.json as the first file in outputs/. Shared between programmatic and agentic modes. Used by validation_tools for run comparison.
title: RunProvenance
description: Full provenance record for a workflow run. Written before any LLM calls, including dry-runs.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the run was initiated.

mode.description: Whether this run was executed via the Python package or an agent session.

dry_run.description: If true, no LLM calls were made. Provenance records planned execution only.

git_version.description: Output of git describe --tags --always --dirty. E.g. v0.3.1-2-gabcdef-dirty.

prompts.description: Map of prompt label to file path and sha256 content hash.

content_hash.description: sha256 hex digest of prompt file content at run time.

schemas_used.description: Map of schema label to file path and sha256 content hash.

settings.description: Model and runtime settings active for this run.

input_hash.description: sha256 hex digest of the serialised input, for reproducibility checks.
